case_title: LION DIAMONDS GROUP, INC. VS. ANTHONY MARENCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE /DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS); (JONATHAN DOMATOV) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LION DIAMONDS GROUP, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PHONE FROM PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY LION DIAMONDS GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARENCO, ANTHONY (A/K/A) TONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
